loop1.title: Live Operations & Runtime
loop1.note: Showing total active energy delivered (import register) — per-phase energy, run-hours, starts, and availability are not measured by this electrical meter.

loop1.title: Runtime & Duty
loop1.note: Showing load factor and total energy — run-hours, starts, and demand limits are not measured by this asset's meter.

loop1.title: Energy & Reliability
loop1.note: Showing total active and apparent energy for last week — reactive energy and reliability metrics (MTBF/MTTR) are not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing Active and Reactive Energy history — the card's original 'Backup Readiness' series (Autonomy, Backup Time, Load Pressure, Headroom) are battery-domain metrics not measured by this DG meter and are therefore blanked.
